nasb.text: He struck them ruthlessly with a great slaughter; and he went down and lived in the cleft of the rock of Etam.

esv.text: And he struck them hip and thigh with a great blow, and he went down and stayed in the cleft of the rock of Etam.

cnv.text: 參孫擊打他們，連腿帶腰都砍斷了，那是一場極大的殺戮；然後他下去，住在以坦磐石的穴中。

ccb.text: 参孙大肆击杀他们，杀死了很多人。事后，他下到以坦，住在那里的岩洞里。
